headline: Morgan Stanley sends a message to wealthy clients chasing AI stocks
summary: The AI trade made Morgan Stanley's wealthiest clients a lot of money. Now the firm wants them to start looking beyond it. Kathleen Entwistle, managing director and private wealth advisor at Morgan Stanley Private Wealth Management, appeared on CNBC's Fast Money on May 26 to lay out where she is ...

headline: E*TRADE from Morgan Stanley Releases Monthly Sector Rotation Study
summary: NEW YORK, June 01, 2026--E*TRADE from Morgan Stanley today released the data from its monthly sector rotation study, which indicates whether clients were net buyers or sellers in each of the 11 core stock market sectors defined by the Global Industry Classification Standard (GICS). These figures, which encompass activity in all US-traded stocks (including OTC) and ADRs, reflect purchases and sales of the individual stocks in each sector, as well as dividend investments and options exercises and

headline: Zscaler Stock Surges. Wall Street Is Buying the Company’s ‘Trust Me Story’ on AI.

headline: 'Disrupted or dead': AI is crushing a generation of startups built before ChatGPT
summary: The AI boom that has funneled more than $250 billion into OpenAI and Anthropic has left hundreds of startups built before ChatGPT's arrival in 2022 stranded.

headline: Why The Flutter Entertainment (FLUT) Investment Narrative Is Shifting As Expectations And Valuations Reset
summary: Flutter Entertainment’s fair value estimate has been reset from $187.54 to $162.72, a move that trims the central valuation view by about 13.2%. This adjustment sits alongside a clear split in analyst opinion, with some treating lower targets as a reset of expectations, while others see them as a sign that growth and earnings assumptions may have been too optimistic. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative could shape the way you interpret future updates on the stock. Stay...
